name: 工具人反派皇后（權謀型）
description: 皇后非太子生母，暗中與外敵勾結企圖廢太子。她代表了宮廷中最大的結構性威脅，所有的陰謀線都匯聚於她，使她成為觀眾最期待被打倒的靶心角色。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated as a Doomed Palace Maid...Modern Knowledge Turned Her Into the Prince’s Treasure
examples.excerpt: That girl has a few tricks up her sleeve, but she is lying. The crown prince hasn't even eaten, nor will he listen to her advice and go to the Imperial Academy. However, why don't we keep her around? ... Even if I wanted to eliminate him, what difference would it make? Old fool. If you dare touch me today, my entire clan will surely revolt.
examples.context: 皇后非太子生母，暗中與外敵勾結企圖廢太子。她代表了宮廷中最大的結構性威脅，所有的陰謀線都匯聚於她，使她成為觀眾最期待被打倒的靶心角色。
